personal.name: Alex Chen
personal.title: Full Stack Developer
personal.tagline: I build accessible, pixel-perfect digital experiences for the web.
personal.bio: I'm a developer passionate about crafting beautiful and functional web experiences. I specialize in modern web technologies and focus on creating products that are both visually appealing and technically sound.
personal.currentRole: Senior Full Stack Engineer at TechCorp
personal.currentRoleDescription: Building and maintaining critical features that power our platform. Working with cross-functional teams to deliver seamless user experiences.

about.title: About
sections: I'm a full-stack developer with a passion for creating beautiful, accessible web experiences. My work focuses on the intersection of design and development.

Over the past 5+ years, I've had the opportunity to work across diverse settings—from fast-paced startups to established tech companies. I love tackling complex problems and building solutions that scale.
In my spare time, you'll find me exploring new technologies, writing technical articles, or contributing to open source projects.

experience.title: Senior Full Stack Engineer
experience.description: Led development of core platform features. Mentored junior developers and established best practices for code quality and performance.

experience.title: Full Stack Developer
experience.description: Built and shipped multiple products from concept to production. Owned both frontend and backend development.

experience.title: Junior Frontend Developer
experience.description: Developed responsive web applications and collaborated with design team on UI/UX implementation.

projects.title: Project Management Platform
projects.description: A collaborative project management tool that helps teams organize tasks, track progress, and communicate efficiently.
projects.longDescription: Built a full-featured project management platform with real-time collaboration, file sharing, and team communication features. The platform uses React for the frontend and Node.js for the backend.

projects.title: E-commerce Platform
projects.description: A modern e-commerce platform with product catalog, shopping cart, and secure checkout.
projects.longDescription: Designed and developed a scalable e-commerce solution with Stripe integration, inventory management, and analytics dashboard.

projects.title: Analytics Dashboard
projects.description: Real-time data visualization dashboard for tracking application metrics and user behavior.
projects.longDescription: Created an interactive dashboard with charts, filters, and custom reports. Handles millions of data points with smooth performance.

projects.title: AI Content Generator
projects.description: Tool that uses AI to generate creative content and assist with writing tasks.
projects.longDescription: Built a web application leveraging modern AI APIs to help users generate high-quality content. Features include templates, editing tools, and export options.
